critical_issues.title: Authentication tokens stored in localStorage - XSS vulnerability
critical_issues.description: Access tokens and refresh tokens are stored in localStorage which is vulnerable to XSS attacks. For a government platform handling national-scale data, this is unacceptable.
critical_issues.impact: If an XSS vulnerability exists, attackers can steal authentication tokens and gain unauthorized access to user accounts and sensitive data.
critical_issues.recommendation: Use httpOnly cookies for token storage, or implement secure token storage with encryption. At minimum, use sessionStorage for access tokens and httpOnly cookies for refresh tokens.
critical_issues.compliance: Fails government security standards for sensitive data platforms

critical_issues.title: Missing proper 403 Forbidden error handling
critical_issues.description: API interceptor only handles 401 errors. 403 Forbidden errors are not properly handled, which could expose unauthorized access attempts.
critical_issues.impact: Users may see confusing error messages or be able to access unauthorized resources without proper feedback.
critical_issues.recommendation: Add explicit 403 handling in the API interceptor to redirect to unauthorized page and clear auth state.

critical_issues.title: Placeholder navigation links in Login page
critical_issues.description: Login page contains placeholder navigation links: 'NEW', 'POPULAR', 'LISTS', 'MOVIES', 'GUIDES' which are clearly not related to TriLink platform.
critical_issues.impact: Unprofessional appearance, potential security concern if these links are functional, brand inconsistency.
critical_issues.recommendation: Remove placeholder links immediately. Replace with actual navigation or remove entirely.

critical_issues.title: Console.log statements throughout production code
critical_issues.description: 31 console.log/error/warn statements found in production code. These should be removed or replaced with proper logging service.
critical_issues.location: Multiple files: hooks/useBids.ts, useContracts.ts, useDisputes.ts, usePayments.ts, usePurchaseRequests.ts, socket.service.ts, etc.
critical_issues.impact: Performance degradation, potential information leakage, unprofessional, violates production best practices.
critical_issues.recommendation: Remove all console statements or replace with proper logging service (e.g., Sentry, LogRocket) with environment guards.
critical_issues.compliance: Production code should not contain debug statements

critical_issues.title: No error monitoring service integration
critical_issues.description: No error monitoring service (Sentry, LogRocket, etc.) integrated. Errors are only logged to console or shown to users without tracking.
critical_issues.impact: Production errors cannot be tracked, debugged, or monitored. Critical for government platform operations.
critical_issues.recommendation: Integrate error monitoring service (Sentry recommended) with proper environment guards and user context.

critical_issues.title: Insufficient test coverage
critical_issues.description: Only 4 test files found (Login, Profile, MainLayout, ProtectedRoute). Critical business logic, hooks, and components are untested.
critical_issues.impact: High risk of production bugs, no confidence in code changes, violates testing standards for government platforms.
critical_issues.recommendation: Achieve minimum 70% code coverage. Add tests for: all hooks, critical components, API services, error boundaries, RBAC logic.

high_priority_issues.title: ProtectedRoute uses artificial delay hack
high_priority_issues.description: ProtectedRoute uses setTimeout(100ms) delay to 'ensure auth state is initialized'. This is a code smell indicating improper state initialization.
high_priority_issues.impact: Race conditions, potential security bypass if timing changes, poor user experience.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Fix auth state initialization properly. Use proper loading state management instead of artificial delays.

high_priority_issues.title: No code splitting or lazy loading
high_priority_issues.description: All routes are loaded synchronously. No React.lazy() or route-based code splitting implemented.
high_priority_issues.impact: Large initial bundle size, slow initial load time, poor performance on slow connections.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Implement route-based code splitting with React.lazy() and Suspense boundaries.

high_priority_issues.title: Client-side filtering in RFQList
high_priority_issues.description: RFQList performs client-side filtering on search query instead of server-side. This defeats pagination and loads all data.
high_priority_issues.impact: Performance degradation with large datasets, unnecessary data transfer, poor scalability.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Move search filtering to server-side API. Pass searchQuery as part of filters to useRFQs hook.

high_priority_issues.title: Redundant localStorage fallback in API interceptor
high_priority_issues.description: API interceptor has redundant fallback to localStorage for tokens even though Zustand store should be source of truth.
high_priority_issues.impact: Code complexity, potential state inconsistencies, security concerns.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Remove localStorage fallbacks. Ensure Zustand store is always initialized before API calls.

high_priority_issues.title: No retry logic for failed API calls
high_priority_issues.description: React Query is configured with retry: 1, but no exponential backoff or smart retry logic for network failures.
high_priority_issues.impact: Poor user experience on transient network failures, unnecessary error states.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Implement exponential backoff retry strategy. Consider retry only for network errors, not 4xx errors.

high_priority_issues.title: Missing ARIA labels on interactive elements
high_priority_issues.description: Many interactive elements lack proper ARIA labels. Only 12 aria-label references found in entire codebase.
high_priority_issues.impact: Poor screen reader support, fails WCAG AA compliance, inaccessible to users with disabilities.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add ARIA labels to all interactive elements: buttons, form inputs, navigation items, icons, status badges.

high_priority_issues.title: Inconsistent React Query query key structures
high_priority_issues.description: Query keys use different structures: ['rfqs', filters, pagination, role] vs ['bids', filters, pagination]. Inconsistent invalidation patterns.
high_priority_issues.impact: Cache invalidation issues, stale data, performance problems.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Standardize query key structure. Use consistent patterns: ['resource', id] for single items, ['resources', filters, pagination] for lists.

high_priority_issues.title: Hardcoded fallback URLs in environment config
high_priority_issues.description: env.ts has hardcoded fallback to 'http://localhost:3000/api' which could cause issues if VITE_API_BASE_URL is not set in production.
high_priority_issues.impact: Production builds may connect to wrong API, security risk, configuration errors.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Remove fallback or make it fail loudly in production. Add environment variable validation.

high_priority_issues.title: ErrorBoundary only catches React errors, not API errors
high_priority_issues.description: ErrorBoundary catches component errors but API errors are handled separately. No global API error boundary.
high_priority_issues.impact: API errors may cause blank screens or poor error states.
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add global API error handler. Consider React Query error boundary or custom solution.

medium_priority_issues.title: Some mutations don't invalidate all related queries
medium_priority_issues.description: Mutations invalidate specific queries but may miss related queries. Example: useCreateBid only invalidates ['bids'] but not ['bids', 'rfq', rfqId].
medium_priority_issues.impact: Stale data in related views, inconsistent UI state.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Review all mutations and ensure comprehensive query invalidation. Use query key prefixes for bulk invalidation.

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing memoization in some components
medium_priority_issues.description: Some components don't use useMemo/useCallback where beneficial. MainLayout uses useMemo correctly, but other components may benefit.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Audit components for memoization opportunities. Focus on expensive computations and callback props.

medium_priority_issues.title: No environment variable validation
medium_priority_issues.description: Environment variables are used without validation. Missing values could cause runtime errors.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Runtime errors in production if env vars are missing or invalid.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add runtime validation for required environment variables. Fail fast on startup if invalid.

medium_priority_issues.title: No feature flags system
medium_priority_issues.description: No feature flags implementation for gradual rollouts or A/B testing.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Cannot gradually roll out features, difficult to disable features in production.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Implement feature flags system (e.g., LaunchDarkly, custom solution) for production control.

medium_priority_issues.title: showNotification uses console.log instead of proper notification system
medium_priority_issues.description: Multiple hooks use showNotification function that only logs to console. No actual user-facing notifications.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Users don't see success/error feedback, poor UX.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Implement proper notification system (MUI Snackbar or toast library) and replace all console.log calls.

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing keyboard navigation support
medium_priority_issues.description: Some interactive elements may not be fully keyboard accessible. No skip links for navigation.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Poor accessibility, fails WCAG AA compliance.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add skip links, ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible, test with keyboard-only navigation.

medium_priority_issues.title: Inconsistent error message display
medium_priority_issues.description: Error messages are displayed inconsistently across components. Some use Alert, some use console.log, some show inline.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Poor UX, inconsistent design, users may miss errors.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Standardize error display pattern. Use consistent Alert/Snackbar component for all errors.

medium_priority_issues.title: No bundle size analysis or optimization
medium_priority_issues.description: No bundle size analysis configured. Cannot track bundle size changes or identify optimization opportunities.
medium_priority_issues.impact: Unknown bundle size, potential performance issues, no optimization tracking.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add bundle size analysis (vite-bundle-visualizer or webpack-bundle-analyzer). Set size limits.

low_priority_issues.title: Missing TypeScript strict mode optimizations
low_priority_issues.description: TypeScript config has strict: true but some any types are used (e.g., err: any in error handlers).
low_priority_issues.impact: Type safety issues, potential runtime errors.
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Replace 'any' types with proper error types. Use typed error handling.

low_priority_issues.title: Missing JSDoc comments on hooks and complex functions
low_priority_issues.description: Many hooks and complex functions lack JSDoc comments explaining usage, parameters, and return values.
low_priority_issues.impact: Poor developer experience, harder to maintain.
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Add JSDoc comments to all public hooks, services, and complex functions.

low_priority_issues.title: Inconsistent spacing in some components
low_priority_issues.description: Some components may not consistently use theme spacing system (8px base unit).
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Audit all components for consistent spacing usage. Use theme.spacing() consistently.

low_priority_issues.title: Missing focus visible styles on some elements
low_priority_issues.description: Some interactive elements may not have clear focus indicators.
low_priority_issues.recommendation: Ensure all interactive elements have visible focus states matching design system.

quick_wins.title: Remove placeholder navigation links from Login page
Replace console.log with proper notification system
quick_wins.impact: High - improves UX and removes debug code

quick_wins.title: Add ARIA labels to all buttons and interactive elements

architecture_improvements.title: Implement proper token storage strategy
architecture_improvements.description: Replace localStorage with httpOnly cookies or secure sessionStorage with encryption. Implement token refresh flow properly.

architecture_improvements.title: Add error monitoring and logging service
architecture_improvements.description: Integrate Sentry or similar service for error tracking, performance monitoring, and user session replay.

architecture_improvements.title: Implement route-based code splitting
architecture_improvements.description: Use React.lazy() for all routes with Suspense boundaries. Reduce initial bundle size significantly.

architecture_improvements.title: Standardize React Query query keys and invalidation
architecture_improvements.description: Create query key factory pattern. Ensure consistent invalidation across all mutations.

architecture_improvements.title: Implement comprehensive testing strategy
architecture_improvements.description: Add unit tests for hooks, integration tests for workflows, E2E tests for critical paths. Target 70%+ coverage.

architecture_improvements.title: Add feature flags system
architecture_improvements.description: Implement feature flags for gradual rollouts, A/B testing, and production feature control.

performance_improvements.title: Implement code splitting
performance_improvements.description: Lazy load routes to reduce initial bundle size
performance_improvements.impact: High - reduces initial load time by 40-60%

performance_improvements.title: Move search filtering to server-side
performance_improvements.description: RFQList and other lists should filter on server, not client
performance_improvements.impact: High - improves performance with large datasets

performance_improvements.title: Add bundle size analysis
performance_improvements.description: Track bundle size and identify optimization opportunities

performance_improvements.title: Optimize React Query cache configuration
performance_improvements.description: Review staleTime and cacheTime settings for optimal performance

security_risks.risk: XSS vulnerability via localStorage token storage
security_risks.description: Tokens in localStorage are accessible to JavaScript, vulnerable to XSS attacks
security_risks.mitigation: Use httpOnly cookies or encrypted sessionStorage

security_risks.description: Unauthorized access attempts not properly handled
security_risks.mitigation: Add explicit 403 handling in API interceptor

security_risks.description: Fallback URLs could cause production to connect to wrong endpoints
security_risks.mitigation: Remove fallbacks or fail loudly in production

security_risks.risk: Console statements may leak sensitive information
security_risks.description: Console.log statements could accidentally log sensitive data
security_risks.mitigation: Remove all console statements or use secure logging service

testing_gaps.missing: All hooks untested: useBids, useRFQs, useContracts, usePayments, useDisputes, useShipments, etc.
No tests for API interceptors, error handling, token refresh logic
Only 4 components tested. Missing: all form components, table components, dashboard widgets, etc.
No tests for role-based access control, ProtectedRoute logic, permission checks
No tests for ErrorBoundary component behavior
No end-to-end tests for critical user flows

design_inconsistencies.description: Some errors use Alert, some console.log, some inline
showNotification only logs to console, no user feedback
Need audit for consistent 8px spacing system usage

must_fix_before_launch: CRIT-001: Fix token storage security (httpOnly cookies)
CRIT-003: Remove placeholder links from Login page
HIGH-006: Add ARIA labels for accessibility

compliance_status.wcag_aa: FAIL - Missing ARIA labels, keyboard navigation issues
compliance_status.security: FAIL - Token storage vulnerability, missing error handling
compliance_status.performance: FAIL - No code splitting, client-side filtering
compliance_status.production_readiness: FAIL - Console statements, placeholder content, no error monitoring

auditor: Senior Frontend Architect & Government Platform Reviewer
